title: New feature request - e-mail signature automatically synced when integrating Outlook
excerpt: Feature request: Automatically sync email signature when integrating Outlook to Monday.com. We have an automatic email signature tool for our company, and staff don’t have the ability to change/add a signature. To ask al…

posts.author: janelegall (Jane)
posts.cookedHtml: Feature request: Automatically sync email signature when integrating Outlook to Monday.com. We have an automatic email signature tool for our company, and staff don’t have the ability to change/add a signature. To ask all staff (650+) to upload their signatures into Monday.com when we roll it out company wide is not ideal.
